titleStmt.title: SII 26.145: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 145. (A.R. No. 137 of 1909.) SAṄGRĀMANALLŪR, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records that the king caused the construction of a temple and the installation in it of (the liṅga) called Vīrachōḻa-īśvaram-uḍaiyār after him, at Koḻumam to mark the occasion of the solar eclipse that occurred on the day of the ruler's asterism of nativity. It further records the grant of the (right of worship permanently) in the temple and other grants made by the king to a certain Ejñamutti Mūlasthānamuḍaiyān alias Kaṇṇabhaṭṭaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . konermaikoṇṭān gautama kotrattu Eññamutti śrīmulattāṉa muṭaiyār kaṇṇapaṭṭaṉukku nam Olaik kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu nammuṭaiya janmanakṣatrattile
cūriyakira[ha*]ṇam Uṇṭāṉamaiyāl Itukku parikāramākaRead paripāramākacivaliṅka pratiṣṭaipaṇṇaveṇumeṉṟu nampaṭṭakaḷ namakku coṉṉamaiyil karaivaḻināṭṭuk koḻumattile namakku ṉanṟāka namperā
l civaliṅka pratiṣṭaipaṇṇuvomeṉṟu paṇṇiṉamaiyil Ivana kaṭaṟṟirāl niṉ ṟum tevaraiyum Umāpākaiyum Eḻuntaruḷuvittuk koṇṭu vantu karuṣaṇai yāti pratiṣṭāntamāka Uḷḷa
ṉavellām camaiyakkoṇṭu Ivan ceyvittu nammaiyiṭṭu viracoḻaīśvaramuṭaiyārai tirupratiṣṭai paṇṇuvittamaiyil Ikkoyilāṉatu Ivanukku kāṇiyāka nirvārttuk kuṭuttom Ikko[yilā ]ṉmaikku Ivaṉukku kāṇimu Iccaṅkirāmakālanallūril Eḻu A
vanta Ācāriyamum Ācāriyapokamum Ikkoyilil Avipeli piṭilvāriyum Arccanāpokamum Ivantāne ceytukoḷvāṉāka Ivaṉukku viracoḻa Īśvaramuṭaiyār koyil kāṇiyāka ku ṇuttirappallavaraiyaṉ paṟṟil Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku Amutupaṭiyuṭpaṭa viṭṭuk kalveṭṭiṉa nelvitai Aiṅka
ttom Ivaṉukkum Ivan makkaḷukkum vilaiyoṟṟi tanmatāṉa śrītaṉattukku Uriccāvatāka Ivaṉukku paricāramāka lattil Ivaṉukku kāṇiyāka viṭṭa nel vitai mukkalamuṅ koṇṭu Iṉṉāyaṉār koyilukku Ivaṉcey
Digital edition of SII 26.145 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
